title: Surgeon Vacancy at Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Surgeon to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates:
Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates!
